curation_notes: Primary locations derived from the patch diff. The Delegations.GetRolesForTarget method in metadata/metadata.go returned a map[string]bool, whose non-deterministic iteration order in Go caused delegation roles to be visited in random order. The SuccinctRoles.GetRolesForTarget method in the same file had the same issue. The consumer in metadata/updater/updater.go (preOrderDepthFirstWalk) iterated over the map, propagating the non-deterministic order. The fix replaces the map return type with an ordered []RoleResult slice. Vulnerability class kept as race-condition per CWE-362 — the non-deterministic map iteration order is analogous to a race condition, producing inconsistent behavior across executions.
